205.reason: [This line incorrectly treats successful parsing as an error. After parsing MainFuncDef, the parser should accept end of input (tnow2 may be null or valid next token), but returning tnow2 here causes the parser to continue expecting more tokens, leading to incorrect behavior. The else block should not print an error and should handle end-of-input correctly.]
